version_description: Different chords and chord values and voicings.

versions.version_description: Tab and chords based off the studio recorded version (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vYueUekxZNU).

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: If I Ever Leave This World Alive

content:
ONE FINE DAY Carole King

[capo up 4 frets (optional)]
This is my own version with James Taylor-type chord voicings
It's kind of pretty, play it slower than normal

[CHORDS/intro]
[ch]G[/ch]     320033
[ch]Em7[/ch]   020033
[ch]Csus2[/ch] X32033
[ch]Cmaj7[/ch] X32000
[ch]Dsus4[/ch] XX0233
[ch]D[/ch]     XX0232
[ch]Dsus2[/ch] XX0230

[CHORDS/verse]
[ch]Gmaj7[/ch] XX5432
[ch]C[/ch]     X32003
[ch]Cm7[/ch]   X3X343
[ch]Bm7[/ch]   X20232
[ch]G7[/ch]    323003
[ch]G9[/ch]    303233
[ch]G6[/ch]    320000

[CHORDS/bridge]
[ch]A7[/ch]    X02020
[ch]Em[/ch]    XX5453
[tab][ch]F#m7[/ch]  XX7675
D13   XX0577 (yeah baby)[/tab]

[INTRO]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Csus2[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]Gmaj7[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]

[VERSE 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
One fine day, you'll look at me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]               [ch]Cm7[/ch]
And then you'll know our love was meant to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Csus2[/ch]      [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Gmaj7[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Csus2[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
One fine day, you're gonna want me for your guy[/tab]

[VERSE 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
Those arms I long for, will open wide[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]             [ch]Cm7[/ch]
That love I've waited for will wrap me up inside[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Csus2[/ch]      [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]G7[/ch] [ch]G9[/ch]
One fine day, you're gonna want me for your guy[/tab]

[BRIDGE]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                [ch]Cm7[/ch]
Though I know that you're the kind of girl[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Csus2[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G7[/ch]
Who only wants to run around[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]         [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]A7[/ch]       [ch]Em7[/ch]
I'll keep waiting and someday darling[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]D13[/ch]
You'll come to me when you want to settle down[/tab]

[VERSE 3]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
Oh One fine day I'll come knocking at your door[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]               [ch]Cm7[/ch]
And then you'll want the love you threw away before[/tab]

[OUTRO]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Csus2[/ch]        [ch]Cm7[/ch]
One fine day, you're gonna want me for your[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]Csus2[/ch]        [ch]Cm7[/ch]
One fine day, you're gonna need me for your[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]       [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
One fine day, you're gonna want me for your guy[/tab]

[ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Csus2[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]Gmaj7[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]G6[/ch]
